description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, rectangular layout and a flat roof. The structure is surrounded by a large, neatly maintained green lawn and features a paved driveway leading up to the main entrance. A cluster of mature trees is positioned to one side of the property, providing natural shade and privacy. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely white or off-white, and the windows are arranged in a linear, asymmetrical pattern. The building appears to have a modest footprint, with no visible porch or veranda, and the roofline is clean and unembellished. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light exterior, and a large green lawn bordered by trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a cluster of trees to the right.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the tree cluster in the foreground and the full extent of the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view with the trees on the left and the building's back facade visible, showing the lawn extending behind.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the building's rectangular layout, driveway, and the open lawn area.
